description: A recruiter needs to generate an official offer letter for a successful candidate.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the approved offer details (salary, start date, title) from the ATS.

expected_outcome.value: Recruiter confirms all final offer terms.

nodes.task_description: Generate the offer letter using the company's standard template and the approved details.

expected_outcome.value: Recruiter successfully generates a populated offer letter document.

nodes.task_description: Send the offer letter to the candidate for electronic signature.

expected_outcome.value: Recruiter sends the letter via an e-signature platform.
